raw_consumer_statement: A company that identified itself as XXXX XXXX charged me {$800.00}. Service fee. It was not XXXX XXXX, instead it was a person with a XXXX mailing address. I realized immediately that day that they were a fraud. I called XXXX XXXX, and their customer service told me the charge was not posted and that I needed to do nothing further. I asked about closing the account in order to not pay this fraudulent charge and the customer service agent said there was no need. I reiterated my concern and she repeated that there was no need to cancel the card. Subsequently I have been charged this amount in my bill with XXXX claiming I received services. This is absolutely false.
